stemHtml: A flight in controlled airspace is being subjected to unlawful interference, with a hostage situation. According to SERA, the pilot shall attempt to notify ATC of...

options.a: any significant circumstances associated with the interference.
options.b: the position of the aircraft and the time in UTC when the interference started.
options.c: the type of aircraft being flown.
options.d: the flight number, the flight time remaining, and any information about the type(s) of weapon being used.
